description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a solid, dark wooden handle with a natural grain texture and a slightly weathered appearance. The head is made of metal, with a matte, dark gray finish, and consists of a flat striking face on one side and a wedge-shaped peen on the opposite side, typical of a cross-peen hammer. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, with the head securely mounted atop the handle. The hammer's head is slightly wider than the handle, providing a balanced and ergonomic grip for effective force transfer. No visible branding, logos, or decorative elements are present, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional. The surfaces appear hard and durable, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban or workshop environments.
description: A sturdy hammer with a dark wooden handle and a matte metal cross-peen head, designed for durability and utility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the cross-peen head with both the flat and wedge faces visible.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handle and the width of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the cross-peen head and handle.
description_view_3: Reverse end-on view, displaying the back of the hammer head and the handle's end.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a natural grain texture, cylindrical shape, and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Cross-peen hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a wedge-shaped peen on the other, made of steel.
